title: An Act appropriating $556,043 to the Virgin Islands Taxicab Commission in the fiscal year October 1, 2024 through September 30, 2025
text:
ACTNO.8907
BILL NO. 35-0360
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providingan appropriation to the Virgin Islands Taxicab Commission in the fiscal year
October 1,2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sum, or as much thereof as may be necessary, is
appropriated out ofany available funds in the Taxi License Fund to the Virgin Islands Taxicab
Commission for the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025.
2114 TAXI REVOLVING FUND FY 2025
480 VIRGIN ISLANDS TAXICAB COMMISSION
Funding for Existing Filled Positions $ 395,603
TOTAL 480 VIRGIN ISLANDS TAXICAB COMMISSION $ 395,603
TOTAL 2114 TAXI REVOLVING FUND $ 395,603
6068 TOURISM ADVERTISINC REVOLVING FUND FY 2025
480 VIRGIN ISLANDS TAXICAB COMMISSION
Funding for Existing Vacant Positions $ 145,440
Operating Expenses $ 15,000
TOTAL 480 VIRGIN ISLANDS TAXICAB COMMISSION $ 160,440
TOTAL 6068 TOURISM ADVERTISING REVOLVING FUND $ 160,440
GRAND TOTAL 480 VIRGIN ISLANDS TAXICAB COMMISSION $ 556,043

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 1ay of
September, A.D., 2024.
Novelle E. Francis,
President
Secretary
Bill No. 35-0360 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
a.
Governor
